subject: PR triage + CI recovery COMPLETE — main branch GREEN

PR_1_audit_cla_integration.rationale_one_line: Audit-only artifacts pre-Bridge / pre-UDNA, superseded by newer LANE01-* canonical audits already on main.

PR_2_T_INT_01_aier_code_schema.rationale_one_line: Migration applied DB-side via different path (PASS_WITH_NOTES); canonical SQL file + DOWN still missing on main = code/DB drift; needs slim follow-up PR.

PR_3_T_INT_02_service_token_broker.rationale_one_line: Broker migration registered DB-side but app code (route.ts, lane-broker.ts) missing from main; auth surface OUT OF SCOPE for cleanup brief; needs slim follow-up.

PR_4_LANE01_naming_convention.rationale_one_line: Convention propagated de-facto via merged PRs #5/#6/#7; canonical NAMING_CONVENTION_DELIVERABLES.md missing = small governance gap; needs slim re-PR.

after_post_merge.note: No separate governance/lint jobs exist in .github/workflows/ci.yml; the single job covers typecheck + build sequentially.

ci_fixes_applied: fix(test): align chat-stream route.test fixtures with current ContextBundle (179fccd1)
fix(credentials): split non-async exports into ./types.ts to satisfy use-server rule (875d0153)
fix(ci): make sync-env.mjs skip gracefully when root .env.local is absent in CI (1283cd0f)
fix(ci): reconcile missing platform-specific native deps after npm ci (7aab0977)
fix(ci): explicitly install missing tailwind oxide linux native binary (d93e7eb9)
fix(ci): add placeholder OPENAI_API_KEY/ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for build-time SDK init (df31b506)

R1_3_deferred_prs_need_slim_re_pr.owner_suggestion: CLA dispatches sequentially after this cleanup

R2_lockfile_cross_platform_regen.description: package-lock.json was generated on Windows; lacks resolved URLs for non-Windows platform native binaries. Long-term fix is to regenerate on Linux. Current CI workaround: explicit npm install of @tailwindcss/oxide-linux-x64-gnu.

R3_env_policy_doc_update.description: Document the new CI-skip path in docs/06_POLICY/06_ENV_POLICY_v1.md.

R4_claude_worktrees_gitlinks.description: .claude/worktrees/* committed as gitlinks without .gitmodules. Post-job CI cleanup emits non-blocking warning. Either register or remove.

R5_embed_query_lazy_init.description: apps/web/src/lib/memory/embed-query.ts eager-instantiates `new OpenAI()` at module load — works around with placeholder env var on CI but proper fix is lazy-init pattern.

next_action_for_cla: Acknowledge cleanup completion. Optional: dispatch follow-up tasks for R1 (3 deferred PRs) and R2/R5 (build hygiene). No blocker for any other in-flight task.
